Appearance:
Robert M. Maltz, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Aldema Investment Corporation of Florida, Beach Properties, Inc. and Joseph Lipskar
Richard Soroori, plaintiff and opposing party in Propria Persona

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted with modification. Defendant Aldema Investment Corporation of Florida, Beach Properties, Inc. and Joseph Lipskar's motion to compel attendance at deposition is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to meet and confer with counsel for defendant to schedule his deposition at a mutually convenient time. The deposition shall be completed on or before January 21, 2009. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $536.87 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
MODIFICATION. That if trial is continued, deposition shall be completed by February 23, 2009. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
